narrative:
Orwell Twp township has 1,554 registered voters, with 60.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a clear Republican lean of 6.2 percentage points.
